title: waltheria indica var. americana
intro: Waltheria indica var. americana, also known as American Waltheria or American Trumpet, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States, belonging to the family Sterculiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Waltheria indica var. americana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and colds, and treat various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, as well as being used in topical applications for skin treatments.
